entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop species whose genetic resources are being managed and characterized

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The international research center maintaining the chickpea genebank

entities.name: MORPHO-AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Physical and agricultural characteristics used to characterize chickpea genetic resources

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of the chickpea genetic resources

entities.name: MINI CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A smaller, highly representative subset of the chickpea genetic resources

entities.name: REFERENCE SET
entities.description: A subset of the composite collection formed using genotyping data

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The method of determining the genetic makeup of the composite collection

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation within the chickpea population

entities.name: DIVERSITY
entities.description: The range of genetic variation present in the chickpea collections

entities.name: ALLELIC VARIATION
entities.description: The differences in alleles at specific loci within the population

entities.name: ASSOCIATION GENETICS
entities.description: A method used to link genetic markers with specific agronomic traits

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with agronomic traits

entities.name: APPLIED BREEDING
entities.description: The process of using validated genetic markers to improve crop varieties

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: An agronomic trait characterized by a shorter growth cycle

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: An agronomic trait characterized by high productivity

entities.name: LARGE SEED SIZE
entities.description: An agronomic trait characterized by the physical size of the seeds

entities.name: SEED NUTRITIONAL TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the nutritional quality of the seeds

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand adverse environmental conditions

entities.name: WILD CICER
entities.description: Wild relatives of the cultivated chickpea used for introgression

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist pests or diseases

entities.name: CULTIGEN GENEPOOL
entities.description: The total genetic diversity available in cultivated chickpea
